# jamfprotect_analytic_set (List Resource)

Lists analytic sets in Jamf Protect.

## Example Usage

```terraform
list "jamfprotect_analytic_set" "example" {
  provider = jamfprotect
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `name_prefix` (String) Optional name prefix filter applied to listed analytic sets.
